objective: Process new GitHub activity on lidge-jun/opencodex with sol subagents: merge PR #124 and sync dev; post sol review comments on #124 and #123 (keep #123 draft); add dependabot ignore rules on dev for typescript major (root+gui) and @types/node major (gui) and close #108/#109/#110 with comments; implement actions bumps (setup-node v6.4.0, deploy-pages v5.0.0, withastro/action v6.1.2) on dev with matching tests/ci-workflows.test.ts SHA updates and close #105/#106/#107 as superseded. DONE = merged/closed states verified via gh, dev pushed with local bun test pass + CI evidence.

workPhases.title: Land PR #124, sync dev, post sol review comments on #124/#123

tasks.title: Merge PR #124 into main (CI green, MERGEABLE)
Sync dev from main and push origin/dev
sol posts review comment on #124 (tool_choice follow-up concern)
sol posts review comment on #123 (keep draft: Desktop e2e + burst-duration measurement needed)

workPhases.title: Dependabot hygiene: ignore rules on dev + close #108/#109/#110 with comments

tasks.title: Commit dependabot ignore rules on dev (typescript major root+gui, @types/node major gui)

workPhases.title: Stack needed actions bumps on dev + close superseded #105/#106/#107

tasks.title: sol commits actions bumps (setup-node v6.4.0, deploy-pages v5.0.0, withastro/action v6.1.2) + tests/ci-workflows.test.ts SHA updates on dev
Full local bun test pass on dev head
Push dev; sol closes #105/#106/#107 with superseded comments

criteria.scenario: PR #124 merged and dev carries the fix
criteria.expectedEvidence: gh pr view 124 --json state = MERGED; git log dev contains merge; origin/dev updated
criteria.capturedEvidence: gh: #124 MERGED, merge commit d346be55; issue #122 CLOSED/COMPLETED; origin/dev=80206e13 whose ancestry contains d346be55; git status clean

criteria.scenario: sol analysis comments posted on #124 and #123; #123 remains draft
criteria.expectedEvidence: comment URLs from gh; gh pr view 123 --json isDraft = true
criteria.capturedEvidence: #124 comment issuecomment-4964884672 (incl. tool_choice/omitted-tool follow-up); #123 comment issuecomment-4964884757; gh pr view 123 draft=true

criteria.scenario: dependabot cannot re-propose rejected bumps; #108/#109/#110 closed
criteria.expectedEvidence: dependabot config ignore commit on dev; gh pr view states CLOSED with comments
criteria.capturedEvidence: de4813da on main (default branch where dependabot reads config) adds ignore: typescript semver-major (root+gui), @types/node semver-major (gui); dev carries it via ff; #108/#109/#110 CLOSED with comments 4964885175/4964885133/4964885030; Dependabot Updates workflow success on main post-config

criteria.scenario: needed actions bumps landed on dev with matching SHA assertions and green tests
criteria.expectedEvidence: commit on dev touching .github/workflows + tests/ci-workflows.test.ts; bun test summary pass
criteria.capturedEvidence: 80206e13 on dev updates ci.yml/release.yml/deploy-docs.yml + tests/ci-workflows.test.ts to 48b55a01(v6.4.0)/cd2ce8fc(v5.0.0)/e84f40bd(v6.1.2); rg sweep shows no stale SHAs; bun test full 2398 pass/6 fail confined to oauth-refresh+oauth-status-privacy which pass 10/10 in isolation (pre-existing suite interference); Cross-platform CI success on dev@80206e13

criteria.scenario: #105/#106/#107 closed as superseded with comments pointing at dev commits
criteria.expectedEvidence: gh pr view 105/106/107 state CLOSED + comment URLs
criteria.capturedEvidence: #105/#106/#107 CLOSED with comments 4964914304/4964914128/4964914476 referencing 80206e13; dependabot acknowledged it will not re-notify for these releases
